chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-4175 of 2021 M/s K.S. Enterprises & others Versus Federation of Pakistan & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of CMA 17110/21 2. For hearing of main case Dated: 23.08.2021 Mr. Manzar Hussain Memon for petitioners. Mr. Kafeel Ahmed Abbasi, Deputy Attorney General. Mr. Muhabbat Hussain Awan for respondents No.4 and 5. -.-.- Mr. Khalid Rajpar Advocate files his Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.3, which is taken on record. It is stated that a Revision before Director General of Valuation/ respondent No.5 is pending. Let the controversy be decided by respondent No.5 in 45 days’ time. The fate of securities furnished by the petitioners shall be subject to outcome of the aforesaid proceedings. By consent petition stands disposed of in the above terms along with listed application. Judge Judge
